name: universal-dev
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'echo "--- Tool check ---" && git --version && node --version && python3 --version && go version && rustc --version && java -version 2>&1 | head -1 && echo "--- CLI check ---" && (docker --version 2>/dev/null || echo "docker: not available (no socket)") && (gh --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "gh: not available") && (kubectl version --client --short 2>/dev/null || echo "kubectl: not available") && echo "--- Done ---"'
